root.sql: select sum(tab.row_date)over(order by tab.begining_of_contract) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT (CASE lag(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,1,null)over( order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) WHEN sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_date , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan + sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint as total_old_loan , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , current_date from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/07/2023' and '30/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) tab
